name: crew
description: Autonomous, GitHub-issue-driven dev workflow for Claude Code. A looping orchestrator (/crew:run) pulls agent-ready issues and drives each through bundled implementation, qa, reviewer, mr-review, and findings subagents — one MR per ticket, GitHub as the source of truth. Ships /crew:ticket (issue writer), /crew:improve (codebase audit → backlog tickets), and /crew:adjust (project onboarding).
